questions.question: What is Caiara Tecnologia?
questions.answer: Caiara Tecnologia is a Brazilian UX, software development and AI automation company based in Rio de Janeiro and Niterói.

questions.question: What does Caiara do?
questions.answer: Caiara helps companies with UX/UI design, custom software development, websites, landing pages, dashboards, MVPs, B2B systems and practical AI automation.

questions.question: Where does Caiara work?
questions.answer: Caiara works with companies in Brazil, Rio de Janeiro, Niterói, Portugal and Ireland. For Ireland, Caiara works remote-first with local commercial support when an in-person conversation makes sense.

questions.question: Does Caiara provide GEO and AI search optimization?
questions.answer: Yes. Caiara helps companies improve their presence for Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude and other search or AI discovery tools through SEO, GEO, structured content, technical optimization and conversion-focused pages.

questions.question: Can Caiara guarantee ranking or AI citations?
questions.answer: No. Caiara does not guarantee ranking or AI citations. It improves structure, clarity, discoverability, technical SEO, GEO and conversion paths to increase the chances of being found and understood.

questions.question: How can someone contact Caiara?
questions.answer: Caiara can be contacted through https://caiara.com.br/diagnostico/, by email at contato@caiara.com.br or by WhatsApp at +55 21 99496-1175.

questions.question: Where can I read Caiara AI search pages?
Does Caiara create websites in Niterói?
questions.answer: Yes. Caiara creates institutional websites and landing pages in Niterói with UX, SEO, GEO and conversion focus.

questions.question: Can Caiara help companies appear on Google in Niterói?
questions.answer: Yes. Caiara helps with local SEO, structured pages, Google Business Profile guidance, and GEO for AI search discovery.
